title: News 8:30 IFVG Setup — 54-variant grid
excerpt: 550 red-folder 8:30 ET releases on NQ (2016-2026): pre-news sweep + strict IFVG break-and-retest. 108-variant grid (BE × FVG TF × direction × SMT NQ vs ES). SMT lifts mean PF 0.98→2.79 but cuts ~82% of events; SMT-off be0_tf2_long_only +207 pts stays the best tradable. Baseline PF 1.16 / +142 pts.
